creator: me4tw.b@gmail.com
text:
5 minutes ago I logged in, ran:

sudo portsnap fetch
sudo portsnap update
sudo freebsd-update fetch
sudo freebsd-update install

This is the result:

[ 85%] Building CXX object src/CMakeFiles/_doxygen.dir/__/generated_src/scanner.                                                                                                     cpp.o

Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd10.1
Thread model: posix
